_instructions: Featured projects shown as large cards. Curated 2026-05-21 from a live GitHub fetch.

items.title: Distributed URL Shortener
items.description: High-throughput shortening service in Spring Boot with Redis caching, MySQL persistence, and Nginx load balancing. JMeter-load-tested at 10K req/min with consistent-hashing key generation; full stack containerized via Docker Compose.

items.title: AI Knowledge Assistant
items.description: Multi-agent system for querying personal knowledge bases. RAG over a vector store via LangChain + LangGraph, model-served locally with Ollama. Web UI for upload-and-ask flows.

items.title: AI Medical Diagnostics Agents
items.description: Multi-agent diagnostic pipeline on GPT-4o with Python multithreading. Optimized inter-agent message routing dropped response time by ~30%; deployable on Kubernetes for parallel patient-data workloads.

items.title: Bank App — Spring Cloud Microservices
items.tagline: Service discovery · API gateway · resilient distributed
items.description: Microservices banking app on Spring Cloud. Eureka service discovery, centralized config, an API gateway, and inter-service communication patterns for a resilient distributed backend.

items.title: Spring Boot 3 — JWT Auth
items.description: Production-style JWT authentication on Spring Boot 3. Stateless access tokens, refresh-token rotation, role-based access control, and proper exception handling for secure REST APIs.
